introSection: The Farglory Ocean Park or Hualien Ocean Park is a water theme park in Yanliao Village, Shoufeng Township, Hualien, Taiwan. It is the first marine theme park in Taiwan.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The construction of the theme park started in April 1999 and was completed and opened in December 2002 with a total cost of US$160 million.

sections.title: Architecture
sections.content: The theme park spans over an area of 51 hectares, which are generally divided into the marine park and aquarium. The main amusement zones are the Brighton by the Sea, Crystal Castle, Discovery Island, Dolphin Lagoon, Harbor Square, Main Street, Mariner's Cove, and Underwater Kingdom. It also features a cable car.

sections.title: Attractions
sections.content:
* Dolphin Show
 * Fly across the Ocean
 * Pirate of El Dorado

sections.title: Transportation
sections.content: The park is accessible southeast from Ji'an Station of Taiwan Railway.

sections.title: See also
sections.content: * List of tourist attractions in Taiwan

fullText:
The Farglory Ocean Park or Hualien Ocean Park is a water theme park in Yanliao Village, Shoufeng Township, Hualien, Taiwan. It is the first marine theme park in Taiwan.

The construction of the theme park started in April 1999 and was completed and opened in December 2002 with a total cost of US$160 million.

The theme park spans over an area of 51 hectares, which are generally divided into the marine park and aquarium. The main amusement zones are the Brighton by the Sea, Crystal Castle, Discovery Island, Dolphin Lagoon, Harbor Square, Main Street, Mariner's Cove, and Underwater Kingdom. It also features a cable car.


 * Dolphin Show
 * Fly across the Ocean
 * Pirate of El Dorado

The park is accessible southeast from Ji'an Station of Taiwan Railway.


 * List of tourist attractions in Taiwan
